title: Savage Cyclopes Mod - Nether & End Edition
description:
This mod adds multiple new Cyclopes to the game, including an Evoker-type mage, and a super-strong Piglin variant.  This mod also includes unique items dropped from the cyclopes, like a Totem of Conjuring.
Forge support coming soon! - MOD HAS BEEN MERGED
body:
**This mod is intended to be used in addition to my [Savage Cyclopes Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/savage-cyclopes-mod), and is kept as a separate file because it has a slightly more difficult/challenging experience.  However, this mod WILL work on its own, so feel free to use it with its companion, in a modpack, or as a standalone mod.**

This mod (currently still in developement) adds 2 new entities to the game (though I have plans for at least 4 more).  If you enjoy the mod, please consider following.  I would really appreciate it.

**ENTITIES**

This mod (currently) adds six new entities to the game, including the Piglin Cyclops. The Piglin Cyclops spawns in Crimson Forests, has extremely high health, and deals a ton of damage.  It drops Raw Porkchops and Gold Nuggets (Although I have some arrow-deflecting hog-hide armor in developement).

The Basalt Cyclops is a golem-like creature that spawns in Basalt Deltas.

The Cyclops Mage spawns in the End Highlands (That's the Chorus Forest biome).  It can summon endermen to assist it in combat, fling you into the air and deal fall damage, and drink potions to heal itself.  When killed, it summons fireballs that fall from the sky and damage the player.  It drops a Totem of Conjuring.
You can find a video of the Cyclops Mage [here](https://youtu.be/fiYcQXGX5do).

The Cyclops Pyromancer is similar to the Cyclops Mage, but is **MUCH** more powerful.  Although it is still in developement, you can spawn it using a Spawn Egg.  It currently only has one attack, where it summon small blaze-looking enemies called Pyromancer Minions, which will fly toward the player and explode, like vicious flying creepers (They have low health, so with a bow, you should be able to stay safe as long as you focus on not getting overwhelmed by the sheer number of enemies).  In the next update, it will be completely finished and will drop a Tome of Burning (A new Item).

The Ender Cyclops is a glowing mob that is similar to en enderman and can teleport (still in developement - only spawnable with eggs), but has higher health and deals more damage, although it is slower.




**ITEMS**

Currently, there are three items in the mod, though several more are in developement.

The Totem of Conjuring can be used to summon five endermen, who will instantly become aggressive towards whoever you are in combat with (a mob or player).  It can be obtained in the hidden chests of End Towers and by killing a Cyclops Mage.  This item is rare, as the Cyclops Mage does not spawn frequently, but it is extremely helpful in situations where you need to escape, or even just in normal combat.

The Ender Tome is a book that can be used once to make METEORS fall from the sky (technically they're dragon fireballs but I think "meteor" sounds cooler) and deal a LOT of damage.  They create puddles of acid that damage entites that walk on it.  It can be obtained in the hidden chests of End Towers and by killing a Cyclops Mage with an Ender Dagger.

The Ender Dagger is a new weapon that has the attack damage of an Iron Sword, but hits twice as fast.  You can only get twenty-five uses out of it, so be careful.  What REALLY makes it powerful is the fact that if you get the final hit on a Cyclops Mage with this item, then it drops an Ender Tome.  This can be found in the hidden chest of an End Tower.


**STRUCTURES**


A new structure called the End Tower can be found in the End. Climbing the stairs in the tower will get you to an empty room.  Really entertaining.  But if you mine through the ceiling, you find yourself in a room filled with healing potions, nether wart, bookshelves and an enchanting table.  Mine throught the cieling of THAT room, and you will discover an obsidian strongbox that houses a hidden chest. This Chest contains valuable loot such as End Crystals, Ender Daggers, Ender Tomes, Diamonds, and Totems of Conjuring.


**THANK YOU**

I really appreciate you clicking on and reading about this mod, and I hope you can have a very good time playing it with your friends, family, or even by yourself.

Also: A lot of people have called me out on spelling "Cyclopes" wrong. I want to clarify that "Cyclops" with no "e" is a singular noun, and "Cyclopes" with an "e" is a plural noun. **GOOGLE IT.**
